# Test: Catalog Validation (US2)
# Validates that apx search shows APIs after publication setup.
#
# Prerequisites: k3d and Gitea running (handled by TestE2E)
# Environment: GITEA_URL, GITEA_TOKEN, E2E_CLUSTER are injected by test runner

# Step 1: Initialize canonical repository with catalog
mkdir canonical
cd canonical
exec git init
exec git config user.name 'E2E Test Bot'
exec git config user.email 'e2e@example.com'
exec apx init canonical --org=testorg --repo=catalog-test --skip-git --non-interactive
exists catalog/Dockerfile

# Populate catalog with test entries using sh -c
exec sh -c 'echo "version: 1" > catalog/catalog.yaml'
exec sh -c 'echo "org: testorg" >> catalog/catalog.yaml'
exec sh -c 'echo "repo: catalog-test" >> catalog/catalog.yaml'
exec sh -c 'echo "modules:" >> catalog/catalog.yaml'
exec sh -c 'echo "  - name: proto/payments/ledger/v1" >> catalog/catalog.yaml'
exec sh -c 'echo "    format: proto" >> catalog/catalog.yaml'
exec sh -c 'echo "    description: Payment ledger API" >> catalog/catalog.yaml'
exec sh -c 'echo "    version: v1.0.0" >> catalog/catalog.yaml'
exec sh -c 'echo "    path: proto/payments/ledger/v1" >> catalog/catalog.yaml'
exec sh -c 'echo "  - name: proto/users/profile/v1" >> catalog/catalog.yaml'
exec sh -c 'echo "    format: proto" >> catalog/catalog.yaml'
exec sh -c 'echo "    description: User profile API" >> catalog/catalog.yaml'
exec sh -c 'echo "    version: v1.0.0" >> catalog/catalog.yaml'
exec sh -c 'echo "    path: proto/users/profile/v1" >> catalog/catalog.yaml'

# Step 2: Search all APIs
exec apx search
stdout 'ledger'
stdout 'profile'

# Step 3: Search by name
exec apx search ledger
stdout 'ledger'
! stdout 'profile'

exec apx search profile
stdout 'profile'
! stdout 'ledger'

# Step 4: Search by format
exec apx search --format=proto
stdout 'ledger'
stdout 'profile'

# Step 5: Search with no results
exec apx search nonexistent
! stdout 'ledger'
! stdout 'profile'

# Step 6: Verify catalog structure
exec grep 'org: testorg' catalog/catalog.yaml
exec grep 'proto/payments/ledger/v1' catalog/catalog.yaml
exec grep 'proto/users/profile/v1' catalog/catalog.yaml

cd ..

# Success: Catalog validation complete
# - Both payment and user APIs appear in search results
# - Name-based filtering works correctly
# - Format-based filtering works correctly
# - No false positives for non-existent queries
